name: apeiron-platform
description: Apeiron - Discord-like platform with SQL, auth flow, sessions, JWT, and colorful cat-themed UI

scripts.test:e2e:lan: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3200 PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0 PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER_PORT=3200 HTTP_PORT=3200 PORT=3200 HTTPS_ENABLED=1 HTTPS_PORT=3543 TLS_MODE=self-signed TURN_URLS=turn:127.0.0.1:3478?transport=udp TURN_USER=apeiron TURN_PASS=apeiron-dev-secret PLAYWRIGHT_IGNORE_HTTPS_ERRORS=1 playwright test e2e/lan-access.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:mobile-lan: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3200 PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0 PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER_PORT=3200 HTTP_PORT=3200 PORT=3200 HTTPS_ENABLED=1 HTTPS_PORT=3543 TLS_MODE=self-signed TURN_URLS=turn:127.0.0.1:3478?transport=udp TURN_USER=apeiron TURN_PASS=apeiron-dev-secret PLAYWRIGHT_IGNORE_HTTPS_ERRORS=1 playwright test e2e/lan-qr-scan.spec.js e2e/mobile-android.spec.js e2e/mobile-ios-webkit.spec.js e2e/desktop-win-chromium.spec.js e2e/visual-profile-smoke.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:mobile-lan:functional: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3200 PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0 PLAYWRIGHT_SERVER_PORT=3200 HTTP_PORT=3200 PORT=3200 HTTPS_ENABLED=1 HTTPS_PORT=3543 TLS_MODE=self-signed TURN_URLS=turn:127.0.0.1:3478?transport=udp TURN_USER=apeiron TURN_PASS=apeiron-dev-secret PLAYWRIGHT_IGNORE_HTTPS_ERRORS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_MOBILE_SKIP_SNAPSHOT=1 playwright test e2e/lan-qr-scan.spec.js e2e/mobile-android.spec.js e2e/mobile-ios-webkit.spec.js --reporter=line
